title: Cindy Olson
compiled_truth: Cindy Olson is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-05-06), Cindy Olson sent 30 and received 565 emails, totalling 595 interactions. Top correspondents: [Kenneth Lay](people/kenneth-lay) (10), [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (5), [Danny Mccarty](people/danny-mccarty) (5), [Michelle Cash](people/michelle-cash) (4), [Elyse Kalmans](people/elyse-kalmans) (4).
